name: Exposed Unsafe ActiveX Method
description: An ActiveX control exposes methods that perform actions outside the browser's security model, lacking proper input validation or origin verification, allowing attackers to invoke dangerous OS-level operations.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL(ActiveX_control) exposes TRANSFORM methods to EXTERNAL(web_browser) that access STORAGE or CONTROL at OS level without AUTH node verifying caller origin or CONTROL node restricting method scope
